failure_mode: No early repetition loop: stream reached max token 2000 and the browser renders a visible page. The run spends most tokens in CSS and starts body markup around token/event 1904; it never emits a form or script, does not close html, and truncates inside the card grid.
method: Measured from stream_events_measured.jsonl plus content_measured.txt. '<!-- HTML -->' appears at event 1904; <form, <script, and </html> are absent. Chrome renders the partial DOM because browsers recover from incomplete markup.
